message:
refactor(web): use map_or_else for option/result matching per clippy

Replace if-let-else patterns with map_or_else() in response and
router modules to satisfy clippy::manual_map and related lints:

- response.rs: Json::into_response uses serde_json::to_vec().map_or_else
  instead of match Ok/Err
- router.rs: MethodRouter::dispatch uses handlers.get().map_or_else
  instead of if-let Some/None; RoutePattern segment parsing uses
  strip_prefix(':').map_or_else instead of if-let-else chain

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
